page.title: A clearer catalog for students who just want to get started.
page.description: Browse the active modules, understand who teaches them, and jump into the next useful step without digging through overloaded screens.
page.focus: Focus areas include blockchain fundamentals, Soroban smart contracts, and practical open-source contribution patterns for hackathon teams.
page.no_results_description: Try a different search term or clear the filter to see the full learning catalog.

detail.description_fallback: System metadata missing. Awaiting curriculum upload.
detail.mint_prompt: Completed the curriculum? Execute the smart contract below to mint your verifiable credential on the Stellar blockchain.
detail.profile_hint: Finish your profile once, then enrollment will stay available.

cm1yxxxx-intro.summary: Build a clear mental model of wallets, ledgers, assets, consensus, and the role Stellar plays in practical Web3 systems.
outcomes: Explain how blockchain networks reach consensus and record state changes
Understand Stellar accounts, assets, trustlines, and payments
Navigate wallets, transactions, and explorer tooling confidently

modules.title: Web3 foundations
modules.description: The shift from centralized systems to open, shared infrastructure.

modules.title: Stellar network primitives
modules.description: Accounts, balances, assets, trustlines, and transaction flow.

modules.title: Hands-on network operations
modules.description: Use wallets, inspect transactions, and simulate real payment scenarios.

deliverables: A wallet setup and funding walkthrough

cm1yxxxx-soroban.summary: Learn how to build secure Soroban smart contracts in Rust, test them properly, and deploy them with confidence.
outcomes: Understand Soroban contract structure and storage patterns
Write contract logic with clear state transitions and validations
Test and deploy Rust-based contracts to the Stellar testnet

modules.title: Soroban architecture
modules.description: How contracts execute, store data, and interact with transactions.

modules.title: Rust contract patterns
modules.description: Functions, storage, auth, and defensive design for smart contracts.

modules.title: Testing and deployment
modules.description: Run local tests, simulate scenarios, and publish to testnet.

deliverables: A test suite covering success and failure cases

cm1yxxxx-defi.summary: Explore how DeFi systems are composed, from liquidity pools and AMMs to incentives and risk management.
outcomes: Describe how AMMs and liquidity pools price assets
Evaluate the risks behind yield, volatility, and slippage
Design basic token flows for lending, swaps, or rewards

modules.title: DeFi building blocks
modules.description: Pools, LP tokens, swaps, routing, and fee mechanics.

modules.title: Tokenomics and incentives
modules.description: How protocols align participation, rewards, and governance.

modules.title: Risk analysis
modules.description: Impermanent loss, smart contract risk, and system-level tradeoffs.

default.summary: This module is ready for enrollment, but its structured curriculum metadata has not been fully published yet.
outcomes: Understand the main concepts covered by the module
Practice with hands-on labs and guided exercises
Finish with a project or assessment tied to the module theme

modules.title: Core concepts
modules.description: Learn the vocabulary, mental models, and system basics first.

modules.title: Hands-on practice
modules.description: Work through applied exercises and implementation walkthroughs.

modules.title: Project wrap-up
modules.description: Bring the pieces together in a final output or review checkpoint.
